name: spore-example-12-cordyceps
description: spore-core TypeScript example 12: cordyceps — a fully autonomous task-completion agent (the capstone). A ReAct orchestrator audits this repo's Rust code module-by-module, delegating each deep dive to an isolated analysis worker that loads an `audit` skill at runtime (architect-side GuideRegistry + sticky context-manager injection) and escalates mid-loop via a generalized consult/escalation ladder (#114): research helper (soft-fail) then cloud advisor (escalate-to-human).
